zh.lifeSummary: 當Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris於1250年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱時，他的父親Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod51歲，母親Fingula MacCrotan30歲。他於1250年之後與Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1320年在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾帕巴易享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris于1250年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱时，他的父亲Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod51岁，母亲Fingula MacCrotan30岁。他于1250年之后与Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland在苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1320年在苏格兰音巴內-爾帕巴易享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯爾 本 易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacLeod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLeod
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Leòid ‘son of Leòd’, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of Old Norse Liótr ‘ugly’, a common personal name in medieval Norway and Iceland.

History: This is the name of a major Scottish Hebridean clan, associated in particular with Dunvegan on the isle of Skye; also, historically, with the island of Lewis. There are two main branches: the McLeods of Harris and Dunvegan (Sìol Tormoid) and the McLeods of Lewis (Sìol Torcaill). Both branches claim descent from a certain Leòd (Norse: Liótr), who lived in the 13th century. — One prominent bearer of this prominent Scottish name, Alexander McLeod (1774–1833), a Reformed Presbyterian clergyman, author, and editor, emigrated to the US in 1792 from the island of Mull in the Hebrides.

nameMeanings.name: Tormod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, originally a borrowing into Gaelic of the Old Norse personal name Þórmóðr, from Þorr (Thor, name of the god of thunder) + Old Norse móðr ‘mind, courage’.

nameMeanings.name: Norman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from nord ‘north’ + man ‘man’, i.e. ‘Norseman’. This name was in use in England before the Conquest, and was reinforced by its use among the Norman invaders themselves. The Normans were the inhabitants of Normandy in northern France, whose name is a reference to the Vikings who took control of the region in the 9th century. In the 11th and 12th centuries they achieved remarkable conquests, including not only Britain but also Sicily, southern Italy, and Antioch. In the Scottish Highlands it is used as the Anglicized equivalent of Tormod .

en.lifeSummary: When Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris was born in 1250, in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod, was 51 and his mother, Fingula MacCrotan, was 30. He married Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland after 1250, in Cromartyshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1320, in Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris est né en 1250, à Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Fingula MacCrotan, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland après 1250, à Cromartyshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1320, à Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Isle of Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris 1250 in Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod 51 und seine Mutter Fingula MacCrotan 30. Er hat nach 1250 in Cromartyshire, Scotland Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland und wurde in Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris è nato il nel 1250 nel Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Fingula MacCrotan, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland dopo il 1250, nel Cromartyshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1320, nel Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harrisが1250年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアイスル オフ スクイで生まれた時，父Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleodは51歳，母Fingula MacCrotanは30歳であった。1250年以後にスコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアでFinguala MacCrotan of Irelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1320年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアプアッバイで70歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルイスル オフ アイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris(이)가 1250년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 이슬일 프 스카이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Fingula MacCrotan(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1250년 이후 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1320년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 파브베이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬일 프 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.Castle Stornoway, Lewis Island, Western: Stornoway, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Escócia, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris nasceu em 1250, em Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Fingula MacCrotan, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland após 1250, em Cromartyshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Iona, Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United: иона, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.Castle Stornoway, Lewis Island, Western: сторноуеи, Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris родился в 1250 г. в местности исл оф ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Fingula MacCrotan, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland после 1250 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности паббеи, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности исл оф иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Tormod Norman MacLeod 2nd Clan Chief of Harris nació en 1250, en Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Leod Olafson 1st Clan Chief Macleod, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Fingula MacCrotan, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Finguala MacCrotan of Ireland después de 1250, en Cromartyshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1320, en Pabbay, Inverness-shire, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Isle of Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
